title: Song Familiarity
description: This dataset comprises EEG recordings from 29 participants who listened to song melodies and made familiarity judgments. Participants indicated when songs felt familiar, attempted to identify songs by title, artist, or lyrics, and selected from multiple-choice options with visual feedback. Song stimuli were derived from Kostic and Cleary (2009), and synchronized audio reconstructions of each participant's experimental session are provided in the derivatives folder.
methods_description: Participants listened to song melodies and responded when songs felt familiar. After familiarity judgment, participants attempted verbal identification of songs (title, artist, or lyrics). Participants then selected from a four-option multiple-choice display with visual feedback (correct: green highlight with checkmark; incorrect: red highlight with x). EEG recordings were synchronized with audio reconstructions of the experimental stimuli.
